user.title: MQTT Device Sync
user.description: This integration syncs device metadata (area, name) from MQTT discovery payloads to the Home Assistant device registry.

abort.already_configured: MQTT Device Sync is already configured.

data.sync_name: Sync device name to device registry

data_description.sync_area: Update device area when suggested_area is present in discovery
data_description.sync_name: Update device name when name is present in discovery
data_description.overwrite_existing: Overwrite values even if already set by user
